Chicago's Ironwork Experts

Crafting durable, beautiful railings, fences, and gates for Chicago homes and businesses. Built to withstand Chicago winters.

Call Now: +17738177737

Get a FREE Estimate Today!

Uncompromising Quality, Chicago-Forged

IRONCRAFT Iron Railings, Fencing & Gates started with a simple goal: to provide Chicago with ironwork that lasts. We saw too many flimsy fences and railings succumbing to our brutal winters, so we built a company around strength and artistry.

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our fence contractor services.

How long does it take to install iron railings?

The installation time depends on the size and complexity of the project, but most residential railing projects are completed within 1-3 days.

What type of maintenance is required for iron railings?

Our railings are powder-coated to resist rust and corrosion. Periodic cleaning with soap and water is typically sufficient to maintain their appearance.

Can you match existing railing designs?

Yes, we can replicate existing designs to maintain the architectural integrity of your property. Just provide us with photos or drawings.

Reviews From Our Fence Contractor Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"IRONCRAFT installed beautiful iron railings on my front porch. The quality is outstanding, and they really enhanced the curb appeal of my home. The installation team was professional and efficient. I highly recommend them!"

Maria S. Iron Railings

"I hired IRONCRAFT to install an iron fence around my backyard. The fence looks great, and it provides the security I was looking for. There was a small delay due to weather, but they communicated well and completed the job promptly once the weather cleared."

John B. Iron Fence

"IRONCRAFT installed security bars on my basement windows. I feel much safer knowing that my home is protected. The security bars are well-made and blend in with the existing windows."

David L. Security Bars
